forbidden_claims_remaining: Do not claim full temporal execution history.
Do not claim broad paradox metabolism.
Do not claim broad multiverse search or superiority.
Do not claim memory supports parallel shared canonical mutation.

observed_organ_truth.observed_summary: Temporal now records bounded nonzero replay work when replay budget is positive and preserves zero-step behavior only for zero budget.
observed_organ_truth.register_summary: Temporal is now a bounded fork-and-replay identity surface with nonzero step accounting when replay budget is positive.

observed_organ_truth.observed_summary: Paradox now classifies contradiction types from context and condition instead of always emitting one generic injection task.
observed_organ_truth.register_summary: Paradox is now a bounded context-aware contradiction classification gate, not a broad debate engine.

observed_organ_truth.observed_summary: Multiverse now computes task-dependent coherence scores from candidate spread instead of returning a constant 1.0.
observed_organ_truth.register_summary: Multiverse is now a bounded candidate-ranking surface with task-dependent coherence instead of constant coherence.

observed_organ_truth.observed_summary: Memory remains append-only state-vault plus replay-chain validation under explicit sequential shared-vault discipline.
observed_organ_truth.register_summary: Memory is realized as append-only state-vault plus replay-chain validation on the canonical organism path.

scope_boundary: B02 tranche 3 tightens residual temporal/paradox/multiverse/memory truth against live bounded code behavior without promoting those organs above their current ceilings.
